data.description: Trump: Where is the Federal Reserve Chairman, Jerome “Too Late” Powell, today? He should be dropping Interest Rates, IMMEDIATELY, not waiting for the next meeting! President DONALD J. TRUMP
Trump: Fed's Powell should be dropping rates immediately - Truth Social

TRUMP DEMANDS IMMEDIATE RATE CUT FROM FED Donald Trump criticized Jerome “Too Late” Powell, urging the Federal Reserve chair to cut interest rates immediately instead of waiting for the next policy meeting.

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group Provides $9,000,000 Construction Loan and $2,300,000 Forward Permanent Loan Commitment for Wisdom Woods Apartments in Peachtree City, Georgia
data.description: A company specializing in multifamily real estate and renewable energy financing, Churchill Stateside Group (CSG), recently finalized a construction loan totaling $9,000,000 alongside a forward permanent loan commitment of $2,300,000. The funding is designated for the development of Wisdom Woods Apartments, a 22-unit affordable family housing complex in Peachtree City, Georgia. This project falls under the 9% Low Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) program. The construction loan was facilitated by Churchill Mortgage Construction LLC (CM).

data.title: Preeclampsia Foundation Announces Major Maternal Health Initiative at HHS National Conference on Women's Health
data.description: A multidisciplinary task force comprising leading health professionals has been initiated by the Foundation to introduce a unified postpartum wristband campaign aimed at enhancing patient safety. On March 12, 2026, in Washington, the Preeclampsia Foundation unveiled this national initiative. This effort seeks to bolster risk management in postpartum care.

data.title: Netflix Cuts Dozens Of Product Team Jobs Amid Internal Restructuring
data.description: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) stock remained steady on Thursday amidst reports of workforce adjustments within its global product team. The streaming giant is undergoing internal restructuring to realign leadership roles and team configurations. Netflix recently cut dozens of positions within its global product team, primarily in areas supporting marketing design, promotional assets, and creative materials for content and product launches. The affected group mainly belonged to the "creative studio unit," responsible for producing promotional content like posters, trailers, and visuals for the platform and live events. Benzinga has reached out to Netflix for comments on the situation. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: RethinkFirst Names Dinesh Senanayake as CEO
data.description: An experienced executive in the technology and healthcare industries has been appointed to lead RethinkFirst, a prominent company specializing in technology and solutions for behavioral health and neurodiversity. The new leader aims to enhance customer impact and drive product innovation. The announcement was made in New York on March 12, 2026, through a press release on PRNewswire.

data.title: 123Invent Inventor Develops Improved Design for an Envelope (PPA-336)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an inventor from East Amherst, N.Y., shared an innovative creation called the INVELO. This invention aims to enhance efficiency by allowing the reuse of to and from address information from an old envelope on a new one. The INVELO is designed to streamline the envelope reuse process and potentially reduce waste. The inventor emphasized the practicality of this concept, suggesting it could have a positive impact on productivity.

data.title: Clopay® Wins Best of IBS™ Award at 2026 International Builders' Show
data.description: Clopay Corporation, a leading manufacturer of residential and commercial garage doors in North America and a subsidiary of Griffon Corporation (NYSE: GFF), recently received a prestigious Best of IBS™ Award at the 2026 NAHB International Builders' Show. This recognition further solidifies Clopay's position as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Troon Launches Access, Ushering In A New Era In Golf Rewards
data.description: Troon®, a prominent provider of golf and club hospitality services, unveiled Access, a comprehensive golf ecosystem on March 12, 2026. Access combines tee time reservations, subscription discounts, loyalty benefits, and more to enhance the golfing experience. This initiative aims to revolutionize the golf industry by integrating various services into one user-friendly platform.

data.title: New York School of Design and Taejae University Announce Landmark Global Partnership to Redefine Creative Leadership
data.description: A collaboration between New York School of Design (NYSD) and Taejae University was officially established this week through the Global Partnership Program. This strategic initiative aims to connect academic theory and advanced design practices. The partnership brings together two prestigious institutions to enhance learning opportunities, with a focus on promoting cross-cultural exchange. The agreement signifies a significant step in fostering international cooperation within the realm of education and design.

data.title: Did WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. Insiders Breach their Fiduciary Duties to Shareholders?
data.description: Investors are urged to get in touch with the company to explore their entitlements and opportunities with no charge or commitment. Any issue would be managed on a contingent fee arrangement, meaning shareholders would not have to cover the legal fees or costs directly. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the firm for further information.
